mapper.insert: INSERT INTO collection (mid, title, description, is_public) VALUES (#{mid}, #{title}, #{description}, #{isPublic})
mapper.select: SELECT c.collection_id, c.mid, c.title, c.description, c.is_public, c.reg_date, c.update_date, COUNT(cm.movie_id) AS movie_count FROM collection c LEFT JOIN collection_movie cm ON c.collection_id = cm.collection_id WHERE c.mid = #{mid} GROUP BY c.collection_id ORDER BY c.update_date DESC

SELECT c.collection_id, c.mid, c.title, c.description, c.is_public, c.reg_date, c.update_date, COUNT(cm.movie_id) AS movie_count FROM collection c LEFT JOIN collection_movie cm ON c.collection_id = cm.collection_id WHERE c.is_public = 1 GROUP BY c.collection_id ORDER BY c.update_date DESC LIMIT 50

SELECT c.collection_id, c.mid, c.title, c.description, c.is_public, c.reg_date, c.update_date, COUNT(cm.movie_id) AS movie_count FROM collection c LEFT JOIN collection_movie cm ON c.collection_id = cm.collection_id WHERE c.collection_id = #{collectionId} GROUP BY c.collection_id
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO collection_movie (collection_id, movie_id) VALUES (#{collectionId}, #{movieId})
mapper.select: SELECT movie_id FROM collection_movie WHERE collection_id = #{collectionId} ORDER BY reg_date DESC
